model.name: customValidator
model.title: Custom Validator
model.description: To use a custom validator on the route level.
model.label: validation

ref.description: Reference to a custom Validator bean in the registry.

className.description: Fully qualified class name of the custom Validator implementation.

type.description: The data type name to validate. If you specify 'xml:XYZ', the validator is picked up when message type is 'xml:XYZ'. If you specify just 'xml', the validator matches all xml message types.
